ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species the image belongs to */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "image_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "image_author" TEXT /* Author of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  "image_license" TEXT /* License information for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_illustrations" (
  "illustration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each illustration */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species the illustration belongs to */,
  "illustration_file" TEXT /* File path to the illustration */,
  "illustration_width" INTEGER /* Width of the illustration */,
  "illustration_height" INTEGER /* Height of the illustration */,
  "illustration_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the illustration */,
  "illustration_license" TEXT /* License information for the illustration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("illustration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species the map belongs to */,
  "map_file" TEXT /* File path to the map */,
  "map_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the map */,
  "map_license" TEXT /* License information for the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status (e.g., Endangered, Critically Endangered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the conservation status (e.g., threatened, endangered) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to determine the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the plant species */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant species was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat (e.g., forest, grassland) */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
